prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ALUMCASE-CONTAINERS-15PC Product Type: STORAGE_BOX Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: Universal Hobby Aluminum Storage Display Container Set & Case (Various Packs) Description: Keep small parts, crafts, or minerals organized with a Universal Hobby Aluminum Storage Container Set.

The Universal Hobby Aluminum Storage Container Sets are a great addition to any craft set or hobby station. Featuring either 12, 15 or 20 aluminum containers with clear glass lids, you?ll be able to organize all of your small items.

Each case uses a twist off lid so you can safely secure those small parts. Because the top is constructed of clear glass, you'll easily be able to tell your items apart without having to label the containers.

These sets make for a great gift for crafters and hobbyists alike. Search Terms: aluminum jar storage tin container round metal spice oz half one clear top lid organizer organization hobbies display case candles 12 arts crafts cosmetics diy portable travel food grade glass kitchen small jewelry stamps gems Features: - Dimensions of 12pc Cases: - 2" Diameter, 7/8" Deep - Dimensions of 15pc Cases: - 1 3/8" Diameter, 7/8" Deep - Dimensions of 20pc Cases: === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
